title: Dunhuang 100 MW Solar Tower Receiver-Flux-Aware Layout-Aiming Benchmark
description: Release-candidate data and code package for a Solar Energy manuscript on a plant-anchored, receiver-flux-aware, reproducible layout-aiming benchmark for the Shouhang Dunhuang 100 MW molten-salt solar tower. The package preserves the audited 11,915-heliostat coordinate pool, candidate layouts, public weather and terrain inputs, PySAM/SolarPILOT default-aiming tables, reduced PySolTrace direct-audit tables, joint layout-aiming screening outputs, formal paired statistics, manuscript figures, reproducibility configuration, and checksum manifests. It supports numerical benchmark and screening-queue claims only; it is not an as-built plant survey, a certified commercial redesign, a receiver thermal-safety certification, or a bankable annual-yield estimate.
notes: Prepared for the manuscript-facing GitHub release v0.1.7. The DOI 10.5281/zenodo.16957381 is retained only as the source-coordinate archive DOI. The previous v0.1.6 release remains a verified public checkpoint, but the current PDF has post-v0.1.6 Figure 1/Figure 2 polish.
